appraisal_events.evidence: « demanda timidement l'historien de la Fronde à Norpois ... Vous pourriez trouver là un succès considérable », ajouté avec « pusillanimité » et un regard « timide, intéressée et suppliante » adressé à l'Ambassadeur.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrative shows the historian placing himself as a supplicant before Norpois, whom he treats as an influential intermediary with the Institut. This deference locally positions Norpois as a figure of power.

status_effects.explanation: Being solicited with timidity and flattery to influence the Institut grants him local stature as an arbiter or protector, enhancing his immediate social position.
